overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through a grassy woodland area on a clear sunny day. A horse-drawn covered wagon passes by and moves ahead on the same path.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt trail through grassy woodland with rock formations

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail through open grassland

entered.detail: large boulders and rock outcroppings beside the trail
worn dirt path with grass edges winding through the landscape
tall green leafy trees scattered throughout the grassland
tall green grass covering the rolling hills

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through an open grassland area on a clear day. Large rock formations appear on the left side of the trail while scattered deciduous trees dot the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland trail with wooden fencing

events.description: character raises hand to eyes to look into the distance

agents.ego_description: walking while looking around and shielding eyes to see ahead

entered.detail: simple wooden posts marking the edge of the trail

segments.scene_description: The trail continues through open grassland with wooden fence posts visible on the right. The character briefly raises a hand to shield their eyes while looking ahead.

events.description: horse-drawn covered wagon enters from right and passes the character

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as a wagon passes by on the right

notable_agents.action: covered wagon with horse team moving ahead on the trail

entered.detail: wooden covered wagon with canvas top and horse team

segments.scene_description: A covered wagon with horses enters from the right and passes the character, moving ahead on the same dirt trail. The wagon continues up the path while the character follows behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: ascending trail following wagon into hills

agents.ego_description: walking uphill following the wagon that is now in the distance

notable_agents.action: covered wagon moving further ahead up the trail

segments.scene_description: The trail ascends gently through rolling grassland hills. The covered wagon is now visible in the distance ahead, continuing along the same path while the character follows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dirt trail that transitions from a rocky grassland into rolling hills. It begins with the character walking past large rock formations and scattered deciduous trees under a clear sky. As the path continues, the landscape opens further to reveal wooden fence posts on the right, prompting the character to briefly shield their eyes from the sun. The scene then shifts as a horse-drawn covered wagon enters from the right and passes the character, moving forward along the same trail. Finally, the camera follows the character as the path ascends gently through rolling grassland hills, with the wagon receding into the distance ahead.
